institution.name: California Polytechnic State University-San Luis Obispo

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at California Polytechnic State University-San Luis Obispo rose 33% between 2021 and 2024 ($10.2k → $13.6k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at California Polytechnic State University-San Luis Obispo rose 23% between 2021 and 2024 ($28.1k → $34.7k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at California Polytechnic State University-San Luis Obispo rose 16% between 2007 and 2010 ($11.6k → $13.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at California Polytechnic State University-San Luis Obispo fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.8% → 0.0%).
